findings.title: Marketing remains externally red on outcome evidence
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification still fails closed because primary-repo adoption is measurement-pending.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption is still missing.
findings.recommended_fix: Let the marketing owner loop produce fresh measurable outcome evidence, then rerun marketing independent verification before calling the whole stack green.

findings.title: Live Gateway topology verified clean: 21/21 enabled, 0 disabled
findings.mechanism: Direct live cron inspection shows 21 enabled jobs, 0 disabled, 2 running, 4 last-error (all gateway-restart interrupted).
findings.root_cause: Runtime topology is coherent; last-error residue is from a gateway restart, not architecture drift.
findings.recommended_fix: Keep direct cron inspection as source of truth; last-error jobs will self-clear on next successful run.

findings.title: Architecture verifier passes after refreshed independent verification
findings.mechanism: Independent verification refreshed this run, verifier now passes with no errors. External blockers remain isolated to marketing domain.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are healthy; verifier freshness-gate resolved by this run.
findings.recommended_fix: None — architecture verifier path is green. Watch for the stale-verifier health-monitor escalation which was a timing artifact from the prior run.

findings.title: Health monitor shows stale architecture-verifier escalation — timing artifact, resolved this run
findings.mechanism: Health monitor at 11:04 captured verifier failure; independent verification refreshed at 11:06 and verifier now passes.
findings.root_cause: Timing gap between health-monitor run and this watchdog refresh.
findings.recommended_fix: Next health-monitor run will pick up the refreshed verifier pass and clear the stale escalation.

findings.title: Loop "pypi-auto-unblocker" has NO self-improvement mandate
findings.mechanism: Script UNKNOWN has no self-improvement mandate. When outcomes are flat, this loop will repeat the same tactics forever without improving or redesigning its approach.
findings.root_cause: Loop was created without a self-improvement mandate or a third-party verification requirement.
findings.recommended_fix:
Add a self_improvement_mandate section to the loop script that:
  1. Detects when outcomes are flat for N consecutive runs
  2. Triggers a redesign pass: new agents, prompt rewrites, cron changes, or path retirement
  3. Registers the loop in the self_improvement_loops.json registry with checker/runner/verifier
  4. Requires independent third-party signoff before marking the loop healthy again

findings.recommended_fix:

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get a fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing still blocks whole-stack certification even though architecture-owned gates are coherent.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the remaining adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed outcome ownership.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Keep architecture live-topology verification tied to openclaw cron list --json on every watchdog run
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Current live inspection is clean and should remain the source of truth instead of persisted-history drift.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Stops stale topology claims from reappearing in architecture reports.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed against current live view: 21 enabled, 0 disabled, 2 running (watchdog + push-research), 4 last-error (gateway-restart interrupted).
Re-ran independent verification + verifier. Verifier now passes. Architecture-owned gates are all green.
Confirmed all remaining blockers are external (marketing domain). Architecture verification is qualified_pass.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement (external domain, not architecture-owned).

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: Marketing remains red on Codeberg-primary outcome evidence
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: Architecture-owned runtime checks are green. Marketing independent verification still fails closed. The blocker is external.

notes: Architecture-owned verifier path is green (independent verification: qualified_pass).
4 jobs show last-error from gateway restart — self-correcting on next run.
Health monitor shows stale verifier-runtime escalation — timing artifact, resolved this run.
The remaining red is external marketing outcome evidence, not architecture drift.
